# fleetdm_app_store_apps (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve available App Store (VPP) apps for a team.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get available App Store apps for a team
data "fleetdm_app_store_apps" "team_apps" {
  team_id = 5
}

# Output all available app names
output "available_apps" {
  value = [for app in data.fleetdm_app_store_apps.team_apps.app_store_apps : app.name]
}

# Find a specific app by name
output "testflight_id" {
  value = [for app in data.fleetdm_app_store_apps.team_apps.app_store_apps : app.app_store_id if app.name == "TestFlight"][0]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `team_id` (Number) The team to list available App Store apps for.

### Read-Only

- `app_store_apps` (Attributes List) List of available App Store apps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--app_store_apps))

<a id="nestedatt--app_store_apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `app_store_apps`

Read-Only:

- `app_store_id` (String) The App Store ID (Adam ID).
- `icon_url` (String) URL to the app icon.
- `latest_version` (String) The latest version of the app.
- `name` (String) The app name.
- `platform` (String) The platform (darwin, ios, ipados).
